expectations.text: Uses streaming LLM client with event stream processing
expectations.evidence: OpenAI client with stream: true and for await loop processing

expectations.text: Updates UI incrementally as tokens arrive (not after full response)
expectations.evidence: setCurrentResponse(fullResponse) called inside for await loop - real-time updates

expectations.text: Tracks and displays progress (chunk count or similar)
expectations.evidence: setChunkCount(chunks) incremented per token, displayed in UI: '({chunkCount} chunks)'

expectations.text: Accumulates and displays the full response as it builds
expectations.evidence: fullResponse string accumulated and displayed via currentResponse state

claims.claim: Real-time UI updates as tokens arrive

eval_feedback.overall: All assertions pass. Skill provided excellent real-time UI update patterns.
